The collection is impressive, especially if you’re into contemporary and abstract pieces, although some sections felt a bit repetitive after a while...

The space itself is beautiful... lots of natural light, clean design, and plenty of room to actually take in the artwork without feeling rushed.

SFMOMA is an incredible place to explore if you enjoy modern and contemporary art. The museum is massive and beautifully designed, with multiple floors filled with fascinating exhibitions.

You’ll find everything from famous contemporary artists to thought-provoking installations and photography.

Even if you’re not a huge art expert, the experience of wandering through the galleries is inspiring.

A few of us from the staff at The Green Cross enjoy visiting SFMOMA when we’re downtown — it’s always interesting and there’s always something new to see.

Definitely worth visiting while exploring the city.
San Francisco museum of modern art is in downtown area. It’s a huge building with many exhibits both inside and out. Excellent.
